variant: 18,000 lb per column 24V DC wireless mobile column lift
capacity: 18,000 lbs per column; 32,000 to 144,000 lbs total (2-8 columns)

specifications.bearing_type: Double sealed self-lubricating cylindrical roller bearings

features: 24V DC wireless operation for complete portability
Park load on mechanical safety locks
Fits wheels from 13 to 24 inches, tires up to 48 inches diameter
Double sealed self-lubricating cylindrical roller bearings
Twin 6-5/8 inch rubber coated steering wheels
6 inch rubber coated steel rolling wheels (retractable)
Each column operates individually, in pairs, or synchronized
Any column can serve as master control
30+ full lift cycles per charge at 75% capacity retention
Available in sets of 2, 4, 6, or 8 columns
Flexible set configurations - break up or combine sets

optional_equipment.description: Allows lifting passenger vehicles from the side for wheels-free service

certifications: Meets nationally recognized safety standard for vehicle lifts
safety_features: Ability to park load on mechanical locks
Retractable rolling wheels - load rests on lift and shop floor
